title: Engine 5: Buyer Mapping — Coordinates Over Vibes
summary: Ratio lattice applied to a person. Five dimensionless dichotomies (scale, decision style, control, budget posture, customization) specify the buyer regime. Forced comparisons produce coordinates where open-ended questions produce adjectives. The proposal should sound like the map talking back — that's proposal match score. Buyers place themselves more accurately than they describe themselves. One-liner: 'People can place themselves between two things.'
